sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.29 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: Classify the locally finite groups for which the augmentation ideal of the complex group algebra is a simple ring. The problem goes back to I.\,Kaplansky (1965). For partial results, see (K.\,Bonvallet, B.\,Hartley, D.\,S.\,Passman, M.\,K.\,Smith, Proc. Amer. Math. Soc., 56, no.\,1 (1976), 79--82; \ A.\,E.\,Zalesski , Algebra i Analiz, 2, no.\,6 (1990), 132--149 (Russian); \ Ch.\,Praeger, A.\,E.\,...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
